name: manifest_docs
documentation:
Template-backed manifest documentation generation.

## API Reference

### generate_plugin_documentation
Type: function
Source: __init__.py
Signature: generate_plugin_documentation(plugin_name: str, summary: str, entry_point: str, input_schema: dict[str, Any], output_schema: dict[str, Any], libraries: list[str], requirements: list[str], tags: list[str]) -> str

Render structured plugin manifest documentation from schema metadata.

### generate_library_documentation
Type: function
Source: __init__.py
Signature: generate_library_documentation(library_dir: str | Path, library_name: str, summary: str, exports: list[str]) -> str

Render structured library manifest documentation from exported Python API items.

### describe_schema
Type: function
Source: __init__.py
Signature: describe_schema(schema: dict[str, Any]) -> list[str]

Describe a JSON-object schema in manifest documentation format.

### collect_library_api_items
Type: function
Source: __init__.py
Signature: collect_library_api_items(library_dir: Path) -> dict[str, dict[str, str]]

Collect top-level Python functions, classes, and values for library docs.
